verses.text: Israel a cing vantung mi pen kei hong huhpa leh a hong dalpa ahi hi,” a hong ci hi.

Tua ciangin amah in, “Tu-a na tunga kong gen ding thu, a thuman ahi hi. Kumpi thum in Persia gam uk lai ding a, tua banah a lina hong khang ding hi. Tuapa, a dangteng sangin a hauzaw ding hi. Amah in a hauh penpen laitak leh a thahat pen laitakin Grik kumpi a to ding hi
Tua ciangin a minthang kumpi khat a hong kilang ding hi. Amah in gam zaipi tak uk ding a, ama thuthu-in a gamta ding hi

Ahih hangin a thahat pen laitakin a gam hong kitam ding a, khen li a kisuah ding hi. A suan a khakte in ama gam a ukkha kei ding uh hi. Midangte in uk ding uh a, ahi zongin amah zahin vang a neizo kei ding uh hi
“Egypt kumpipa a hong thahat ding hi. Ahi zongin a galkapmang lianpente khat thahat pen ding a, gam lianzaw a uk ding hi

Kum sauvei sim khit ciangin Egypt kumpipa in a kipawlkhawm theihna dingin Syria kumpipa leh ama tanu a kitengsak ding hi. Ahih hangin tua kipawlkhawmna kiplo ding a, tua numei leh a tonpih a silate leh a ta leh a pasal a kithatlum ding hi
“A sawtloin tua numei' behte khat in Syria kumpi sim ding a, a kulhpi sungah tumin amaute a zogawp ding hi
Amah in amaute' milim pasian-te leh a na manpha ngun leh khamte Egypt gamah a pua ding hi. Kum tawmvei sung bek kilemna a om ding hi
Syria kumpipa in Egypt gam sim ding a, ahih hangin zo zoloin a nungkik ding hi
“Syria kumpipa' tate, galsim dingin kithawi-in galkap ding mi tampi a kaikhawm ding uh hi. Tua galkapmangte khat thahat diakin tuikhang bang ding a, galte' kulhpi a luhzo ding hi
Egypt kumpipa zong heh mahmahin Syria kumpipa simgawp ding a, a galkapte tampi tak a matsak ding hi
A galhatna hang leh galkap tampi a thahna hangin kisathei mahmah ding a, ahih hangin a gualzo tawntung kei ding hi
Syria kumpipa khatvei kuankikin a masa sangin galkap a tamzaw a kaikhawm ding hi. A hun kicingta a sak ciangin galkap tampi leh galhiam kicing pikpek tawh a kuankhia ding hi
“Tua hun ciangin mi tampi tak in Egypt kumpipa a lehdo ding uh hi. Daniel' mipihte ahi, mihoihlo pawlkhat in zong a muhsa uh maangmuhna hangin a lehdo ding uh a, ahih hangin a guallel ding uh hi
Tua ahih ciangin Syria kumpipa in kulhpi tawh a kiumcih khuapite luhzo-in a la khin ding hi. Egypt galkapte in gal dosuakzo nawnlo ding uh a, galkap thahat pente a thanem ding uh hi
Galdozo ding om nawnlo uh ahih manin a galte uh a utut-in a gamta ding uh hi. Thuciam Gamah zong lutin a khutsungah tua gam a om ding hi

“Syria kumpipa in a galkap neih khempeuh zangin galsim ding a ngaihsun ding hi. Olno takin a gualzawh theihna dingin a tanu leh a galte ten'sak ding a ngaihsun ding hi. Ahih hangin a tangtungzo kei veve ding hi
Tua khit ciangin tuipi tung tawnin minam dangte sim ding a, tampi tak mah a zo ding hi. Ahih hangin gamdang makai khat in amah zogawp ding a, a minthan'na teng a beisak ding hi
Kumpipa a kulhpi a zuankik dingin a gamah hong ciah ding a, ahih hangin gal lel khinta ahih manin amah a beita ding ahi hi

“Tua ciangin kumpi dang khat in ama nung hong zuikik leuleu ding a, a gamsung khan'tohna dingin phiangsiah tampi a dong dingin mi khat a sawl ding hi. Tawlno khat khit ciangin tua kumpipa kithatlum ding a, ahih hangin galsunga si ahi kei ding hi
“Ama zomah Syria kumpi ding pen migilo, kumpi dingin a kilawmlo mi khat ahi ding hi. Ahih hangin amah pen thakhat thu-in zuausiamna tawh kumpi a hong suakvat ding hi
Ama thu a nial galkap honpite leh Pasian' siampi liante khempeuh a mangthangsak ding hi
Zuaugen siamna zangin minam dangte tawh kilemna a bawl ding hi. Minam tawmno khat bek a uk hangin a thahatna a khang semsem ding hi

Amah in a pu a pate' hih ngeiloh, gam hau, gam kilemte nangawn a sim ding hi. Tua ciangin galsunga a lak vante leh nate a nungzuite tawh a hawm ding uh hi. Amah in galdalna kulhpite khempeuh luh ding hanciam ding a, ahih hangin tawmvei sung bek hun a nei ding hi

“Egypt gam hangtakin a sim theih-na dingin galkap tampi a kaikhawm ding hi. Egypt-te in zong galkap tampi tawh nasia takin a na do ding uh hi. Ahi zongin Egypt kumpipa in khemna thuak ding ahih manin gal a zo kei ding hi
Ama muan' pen a thudot mipilte in amah lehbawlin a siasak ding uh hi. A galkapte tampi tak si ding ahih manin gal a lel ding hi

Tua kumpite gel in sabuai khat tungah tu-in an a nekhawm ding uh hi. Ahih hangin a ngaihsutna uh a hoihzawsang om tuanlo ahih manin a kikhem tuak ding uh hi. A hun tung nailo ahih manin a deih bang uh a ngahzo kei uh hi

Tua ciangin Syria kumpipa, a galvan lakteng tawh a gamah ciahkik ding a, Pasian mite' biakna suksiatsak ding a lungngai ding hi. A utbang peuhin gamta ding a, tua ciangin a gam lamah a ciahkik ding hi
“Tua nung ciangin Egypt gam simkik leuleu ding a, ahih hangin a masa-a bangin a piang kei ding hi

Rom mite, teembaw tawh hong pai-in amah do ding uh ahih manin a lau ding hi. Tua ciangin amah kilehkik ding a, a thangpaihna tawh Pasian' mite' biakna suksiat ding a hanciam ding hi. Amah in tua biakna a nusia mite' zolsimna a mang ding hi
A galkapte pawlkhat in biakinnpi leh biakinnpi huang a ninsak ding uh hi. Amaute in nisim biakpiaknate khawlsak ding uh a, a Lipkhaphuai na a suang ding uh hi
Kumpipa in tua biakna a nusia mite a thuzawh theihna dingin zuaugen siamna a zang ding hi. Ahih hangin Pasian' nung a zui mite ahih uh leh thahatin a gualzo ding uh hi

Pilna a nei mite in a pilna uh midang tampite tawh a neikhawm ding uh hi. Ahih hangin tawlkhat sung mi pawlkhat in galsunga sihna leh meikuang sunga thahna a thuak ding uh hi. Mi pawlkhatte in lawkgawpna leh thongkiatna a thuak ding uh hi
Tua bangin thahna a thuak laitakun, pawlkhat in huhna a ngah ding uh hi. Mi tampi in huhna a piak uh hangin amau' metna ding ngaihsutna bek ahi hi
Mi pawlkhat in thahna a thuak ding uh hi. Tua bangin a pian'na thu pen beina a tun' mateng sian'thosakna leh mipha leh misia khentelna, Pasian' sehsa hun a tun'na ahi hi

“Syria kumpipa a ut bangbangin a gamta ding hi. Amah in, pasian-te sangin ka lianzaw a, a Lianpen Pasian sangin zong ka thupizaw lai hi, ci-in a kisathei ding hi. Pasian in amah gim a piak mateng tua bangin a om ding hi

Kumpipa in a pu a pate' biak pasian leh numeite in a it pasian a thusim kei ding hi. Pasian a kici peuhmah khat beek a thusim kei ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh tuate sangin amah a lianzaw-in a kingaihsun hi
Tua pasian-te sangin kulhpi a dal pasian a thupisim zaw ding hi. Amah in kham, ngun, suangmanpha, leh a thupi letsongte, a pu a pate' biak ngeiloh pasian kiangah a pia ding hi
Amah in a kulhpi a ciang dingin pasian dang a biate a sawl ding hi. Amah in amah kumpi-in a sang mite minphatna, zaliatna pia-in, leitang nangawn letsongin a pia ding hi

“Syria kumpipa' hun a bei dektak ciangin, Egypt kumpipa in amah a sim ding hi. Syria kumpipa in a thaneihteng sitloin tuikhang bangin sakol tawh, sakol galkapte tawh, teembaw tampi tawh Egypt a do ding hi
Amah in Thuciamna Gam zong sim ding a, mi tul tampi tak a that ding hi. Ahih hangin Edom gam, Moab gam, leh Ammon gamsungah a omlai sunteng a suakta ding uh hi
Amah in gam tampi tak sim ding a, Egypt nangawn zong a suakta kei ding hi
Amah in Egypt gamsunga kisel ngun leh kham leh a neihsa uh na manphateng khempeuh a la ding hi. Amah in Libya leh Ethiopia gam zong a zo ding hi
Tua ciangin, nisuahna lam leh saklam panin thupiang in amah patausak ding a, thangpaihna tawh galdoin mi tampi tak a that ding hi
Amah in a kumpi puanbuk lianpite biakinn din'na mualtung leh tuipi kikalah a lam ding hi. Ahih hangin amah a si ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah a huh ding kuamah a om kei hi,” a hong ci hi.
